title: How the Pazzi Family Conspired to Overthrow the Medicis
highlights:
Pazzi Conspiracy was a failed coup organized by the Pazzi family to overthrow Medici rule in 15th-century Florence.  ...    On April 26, 1478, during the Holy Easter Sunday Mass in the cathedral of Florence, a group of conspirators led by the Pazzi family murdered Giuliano de Medici and wounded his older brother Lorenzo. Known as the Pazzi Conspiracy, the assassination was the first step in a coup d’état to overthrow the Medici brothers as the unofficial rulers of the  ...    ## A Murder in the Cathedral

La congiura dei Pazzi by Stefano Ussi, 1822. Source: Treccani In 1478, the conspirators were ready to set their plan into motion. Initially, they intended to kill Lorenzo de’ Medici during his visit to Rome during the Easter season. However, the young Medici unexpectedly canceled the trip.
